channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Hantavirus Risk Low In Africa, But Preparedness Urged By WHO
item.description: Addis Ababa, May 13 (IANS) The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) and the World Health Organization (WHO) urged health authorities and the general public to remain alert and strengthen Hantavirus surveillance measures desp
item.content:encoded: Addis Ababa, May 13 (IANS) The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) and the World Health Organization (WHO) urged health authorities and the general public to remain alert and strengthen Hantavirus surveillance measures desp

item.title: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' If Taiwan Issue Mishandled: Xi To Trump

media:content.media:description: Xi said he was "happy" to receive Trump for the US leader's first trip to China since 2017

item.description: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' If Taiwan Issue Mishandled: Xi To Trump
item.content:encoded: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' If Taiwan Issue Mishandled: Xi To Trump

item.title: Cuba Runs Out Of Fuel Amid Iran Crisis, 20-Hour Power Cuts Follow

media:content.media:description: Cuba faces its worst rolling blackouts in decades amid a US blockade. (File)

item.description: Cuba has installed 1,300 megawatts of solar power over the past two years, but much of that capacity is lost to grid instability amid fuel shortages.
item.content:encoded: Cuba has installed 1,300 megawatts of solar power over the past two years, but much of that capacity is lost to grid instability amid fuel shortages.

item.title: Hantavirus Scientists Were Close To Vaccine But Ran Out of Money
item.description: The antibodies developed in the immunovirology lab at the Universidad de Concepcion, about 300 miles south of the capital Santiago, had seemingly neutralized the germ.
item.content:encoded: The antibodies developed in the immunovirology lab at the Universidad de Concepcion, about 300 miles south of the capital Santiago, had seemingly neutralized the germ.

item.title: Trump's 'Great Leader' Praise For Xi, Calls For 'Fantastic' US-China Ties
item.description: Trump-Xi Summit: 'We Are Going To Have A Fantastic Future Together': Trump Tells Xi
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1099004/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump-Xi Summit: 'We Are Going To Have A Fantastic Future Together': Trump Tells Xi

item.title: Russia Attacks Ukraine's Kyiv With Barrage Of Drones, At Least 4 Injured

media:content.media:description: Explosions were heard across the capital early Thursday morning. (Reuters)

item.description: Damage was recorded across six districts of Kyiv, according to the head of Kyiv's Military Administration Tymur Tkachenko.
item.content:encoded: Damage was recorded across six districts of Kyiv, according to the head of Kyiv's Military Administration Tymur Tkachenko.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US Wants China To Play Role In Ending Iran War, Says Marco Rubio As Trump Meets Xi
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: Iran War, Oil To Dominate BRICS Summit As Foreign Ministers Reach Delhi

media:content.media:description: BRICS was created in 2009 as a forum for major emerging economies.

item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi arrived in New Delhi late Wednesday, Iran's embassy in India said.
item.content:encoded: Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi arrived in New Delhi late Wednesday, Iran's embassy in India said.

item.title: US Senate Confirms Trump Nominee Kevin Warsh As Federal Reserve Chair

media:content.media:description: The US Senate on Wednesday confirmed Kevin Warsh as chair of the Federal Reserve.

item.description: The Senate voted 54 to 45 to confirm Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair, who like Trump has advocated for lower interest rates.
item.content:encoded: The Senate voted 54 to 45 to confirm Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair, who like Trump has advocated for lower interest rates.

item.title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Trump Praises Xi, Calls For 'Fantastic Ties' With China As Summit Begin

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: In The Future, AI Will Anticipate Your Needs Before You Know Them, Says Anthropic's Cat Wu

media:content.media:description: According to Catherine Wu, many people already use AI for repetitive tasks.

item.description: Anthropic executive Cat Wu told TechCrunch that the future of AI lies in "proactive" systems that can understand users' routines and automate tasks before instructions are given.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic executive Cat Wu told TechCrunch that the future of AI lies in "proactive" systems that can understand users' routines and automate tasks before instructions are given.

item.title: Rubio Calls China 'Most Important' US Partner As Trump-Xi Hold Summit

media:content.media:description: Rubio has been an outspoken critic of Beijing's human rights record

item.description: Rubio also said he was sure that Trump and Xi would discuss Taiwan, the self-governing democratic island claimed by Beijing.
item.content:encoded: Rubio also said he was sure that Trump and Xi would discuss Taiwan, the self-governing democratic island claimed by Beijing.

item.title: Iran, Trade, Taiwan On Cards As Trump Set To Meet Xi Jinping In Beijing

media:content.media:description: Trump's visit to Beijing marks the first by a US president in nearly a decade. (File)

item.description: Trump arrived for the two-day summit on Air Force One late Wednesday accompanied by top CEOs, including Nvidia's Jensen Huang and Tesla's Elon Musk.
item.content:encoded: Trump arrived for the two-day summit on Air Force One late Wednesday accompanied by top CEOs, including Nvidia's Jensen Huang and Tesla's Elon Musk.

item.title: US-Iran War News Highlights: Ceasefire At Risk As Iran Rejects US Plan, Trump Calls Response 'Garbage'
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: UAE Denies Reports Of "Secret Visit" By Israeli PM Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Israeli PMO on Wednesday claimed that Netanyahu had made a "secret visit" to UAE amid the Iran war.

item.description: The United Arab Emirates denies reports circulating regarding an alleged visit by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the UAE.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1098979/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The United Arab Emirates denies reports circulating regarding an alleged visit by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the UAE.

item.title: Analysis: Trump Wants China's Help On Iran, But Beijing Has Other Plans

media:content.media:description: Trump told reporters on Tuesday that he did not need China's help to convince Iran.

item.description: When US President Donald Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping this week he is expected to ask for help resolving his costly and unpopular war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: When US President Donald Trump meets Chinese President Xi Jinping this week he is expected to ask for help resolving his costly and unpopular war with Iran.

item.title: Matthew Perry Drug middleman Jailed For Two Years

media:content.media:description: The actor had been taking ketamine as part of supervised therapy for depression.

item.description: A middleman who helped provide "Friends" actor Matthew Perry with drugs in the weeks before he died from a ketamine overdose was jailed on Wednesday in California.
item.content:encoded: A middleman who helped provide "Friends" actor Matthew Perry with drugs in the weeks before he died from a ketamine overdose was jailed on Wednesday in California.

item.title: Netanyahu's Coalition Submits Bill To Dissolve Parliament, Trigger Fresh Polls

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu's coalition on Wednesday submitted a bill to dissolve parliament.

item.description: The bill calls for elections "no less than 90 days" after it is approved, giving Netanyahu flexibility to choose a date when he feels he has the best chance of success.
item.content:encoded: The bill calls for elections "no less than 90 days" after it is approved, giving Netanyahu flexibility to choose a date when he feels he has the best chance of success.

item.title: German Paediatrician Charged With 130 Cases Of Child Sex Abuse Over 12 Years

media:content.media:description: The offences are alleged to have occurred between December 1, 2013 and November 5 of last year

item.description: The unidentified suspect who worked in clinics in Brandenburg state near Berlin allegedly committed the crimes over 12 years, they said in a statement, without specifying how many children were abused.
item.content:encoded: The unidentified suspect who worked in clinics in Brandenburg state near Berlin allegedly committed the crimes over 12 years, they said in a statement, without specifying how many children were abused.

item.title: Netanyahu Visited UAE "Secretly" During War With Iran, PM's Office Says

media:content.media:description: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates

item.description: "During Operation 'Lion's Roar', Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates, where he met with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan," his office said in a statement.
item.content:encoded: "During Operation 'Lion's Roar', Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu paid a secret visit to the United Arab Emirates, where he met with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan," his office said in a statement.
